title: Add BorsaciAI - BIST Financial Analysis Bot to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Financial buzzing with BorsaciAI
gist.blurb: A new community bot just landed in the greenhouse. BorsaciAI is an open-source Telegram assistant that crunches Borsa Istanbul market data so you don't have to.
gist.summary: Added BorsaciAI, an open-source Telegram assistant for Borsa Istanbul financial analysis, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use BorsaciAI to get quick summaries and market data for Turkish companies directly through Telegram.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee analyzing financial charts. A Telegram paper plane motif. Coins or upward trending graphs to represent financial analysis of Borsa Istanbul.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny business tie, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying green financial charts going up. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a small paper airplane. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny business tie, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying green financial charts going up. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a small paper airplane. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background.
